description: Fail-closed sequential contract-preflight campaign for all 26 Idea Foundry axes. Lane roles describe later evidence work; this suite itself is synthetic contract evidence only. Execution state and evidence state are independent.

invariants: position-grouped split
exactly one trace salt
actual input hashes recorded
restart and continuation rows remain separate
A17 is decision-neutral
A21 and A22 are analysis-only
fixed common seeds
total budget conserved
candidate omission and ranking error reported separately
A25 includes the zero-temperature limit
A26 compares against an enumerable exact result
one resident root is frozen then forked
root evaluator candidate TT and cache identities match
raw regret reduction and realized cost vectors are preserved
one explicit action per checkpoint
fresh snapshot guard
matched NN-evaluation and wall-clock accounting
A04 is KG allocation only and does not reopen low-budget KG-stop
pending work is separate from completed evidence
service curves are hardware-profile specific
A14 remains shadow-only before predictive evidence
A16 shares evaluation cache only at the first gate
A11 starts with a root-level particle backend
controller stays frozen during evaluator comparisons
A18 inference uses a deterministic direct path
A19 screens graph seeds before a shortlist
A23 checks make and unmake incremental equivalence
A20 and A24 use grouped splits and matched total compute

conditional_audit.eligibility: preregistered weak-evaluator or OOD slice only

prohibited_inferences: Do not infer play-strength improvement from this lane.
Do not infer production readiness from skeleton, smoke, or contract success.
Do not convert execution success into VALIDATED evidence automatically.

lanes.title: A15 matched CPU/CUDA service-curve readiness
lanes.description: Run a four-cell matched CPU/CUDA measurement-contract smoke with identical model state and paired input bytes. This is not the full service curve or a scheduler-quality claim.
prohibited_inferences: Do not infer play strength or search decision quality from service throughput.
Do not infer energy efficiency without controlled power measurements.
Do not generalize the representative workload to the shipped evaluator.
Do not promote a production scheduler from the readiness grid.

lanes.title: A18 paired deterministic-evaluator readiness smoke
lanes.description: Train parameter/FLOP-matched direct evaluators from three real non-promoted latest.pt bootstrap checkpoints under an identical frozen controller and diagnostic compute contract.
prohibited_inferences: Do not infer held-out evaluator efficacy from training-replay smoke metrics.
Do not infer play strength or production readiness.
Do not treat bootstrap-seeded best.pt as promoted evidence.
Do not allow the controller or compute contract to differ between evaluator arms.

lanes.title: A19 graph-seed screening launch readiness
lanes.description: Validate three real replay/status inputs and hash-bind their non-promoted latest.pt sources, a frozen controller contract, and eight density-matched graph topologies. This launch lane does not parse the model state or emit a shortlist.
prohibited_inferences: Do not call an unmeasured launch contract a graph-seed shortlist.
Do not infer evaluator quality or play strength from topology parity.
Do not use the unmatched heavier upper bound for efficiency claims.
Do not promote any A19 evaluator automatically.
